summary.roadmap_rule: one_shot_approval_candidate_flow is a subset of the broader issue portfolio roadmap

issues.title: PACK-0003 Generated Artifact SSOT Pack
issues.recommended_reason: Historical foundation pack already completed and recorded in pack execution docs.

issues.title: EP-0151 Generated Artifact SSOT Registry
issues.recommended_reason: Child of PACK-0003; foundational artifact registry work is already complete.

issues.title: EP-0152 Repository Artifact Refresh
issues.recommended_reason: Deterministic artifact refresh is historical foundation work.

issues.title: EP-0153 Validation Leaves Repository Clean
issues.recommended_reason: Validation hygiene is already encoded in the repository governance layer.

issues.title: EP-0154 Explicit Refresh Workflow
issues.recommended_reason: Refresh workflow is part of the existing deterministic artifact pipeline.

issues.title: EP-0155 Generated Artifact Refresh Validation
issues.recommended_reason: Refresh validation is a completed support layer.

issues.title: PACK-0004 Agent Handshake Protocol
issues.recommended_reason: Handshake protocol is a historical governance layer and not active one-shot work.

issues.title: EP-0156 Completion Protocol
issues.recommended_reason: Completion protocol is already embedded in runtime artifacts.

issues.title: EP-0157 Repository Completion Marker
issues.recommended_reason: Completion marker is canonical historical infrastructure.

issues.title: EP-0158 ChatGPT Review Intake
issues.recommended_reason: Review intake already exists as a completed repository-native control plane layer.

issues.title: EP-0159 Issue Synchronizer
issues.recommended_reason: Issue sync is historical foundation work and no longer active portfolio work.

issues.title: EP-0160 Handshake Validation
issues.recommended_reason: Handshake validation is a sealed governance layer.

issues.title: PACK-0005 Event Runtime
issues.recommended_reason: Event runtime is historical infrastructure, not active one-shot work.

issues.title: EP-0161 Event Contract Validation
issues.recommended_reason: Event contract validation is already part of the runtime baseline.

issues.title: EP-0162 Issue Event Intake
issues.recommended_reason: Issue event intake is completed plumbing.

issues.title: EP-0163 Completion Marker Event Intake
issues.recommended_reason: Completion marker intake is already embedded in the repository workflow.

issues.title: EP-0166 Event Runtime Safety Gate
issues.recommended_reason: Safety gating for the event runtime is historical, not current portfolio work.

issues.title: PACK-0010 Planning OS
issues.recommended_reason: Planning OS is already the repository-native planning baseline.

issues.title: PACK-0011 Local Agent Supervisor Bridge
issues.recommended_reason: Supervisor bridge is an established operator/control-plane capability.

issues.title: PACK-0012 Work Planner
issues.recommended_reason: Work planner is already present and used by current runtime artifacts.

issues.title: PACK-0013 Repository OS v2 Release
issues.recommended_reason: Release packaging for Repository OS v2 is historical and not active execution work.

issues.title: PACK-0014 First Product Launch System
issues.recommended_reason: First product launch system work is superseded by later product execution artifacts.

issues.title: PACK-0015 Local Execution Adapter
issues.recommended_reason: Execution adapter work is completed infrastructure, not a current portfolio candidate.

issues.title: ACCEPTANCE-0001 Single Product Vertical Slice
issues.recommended_reason: Acceptance slice is complete and recorded by a standalone product execution record.

issues.title: Dynamic Codex Model Resolver
issues.recommended_reason: Model resolution work is already present in runtime artifacts and tests.

issues.title: PRODUCT-0001 Product Launch Checklist
issues.recommended_reason: Product launch checklist is completed and has a canonical completion marker.

issues.title: CONTENT-0001 Content Draft Review
issues.recommended_reason: Content draft review already has a completion marker and should stay out of active approval flow.

issues.title: PRODUCT-0002 Product Launch Follow-up
issues.recommended_reason: Product launch follow-up is already completed and frozen.

issues.title: PRODUCT-0003 Kabukicho Survival Map MVP (UGC-ready)
issues.recommended_reason: Kabukicho MVP UGC-ready scope is already completed.

issues.title: PRODUCT-0003 Kabukicho Map Data Expansion
issues.recommended_reason: Kabukicho map data expansion is the current completed product-facing increment.

issues.title: Approval Console MVP
issues.recommended_reason: Operator tooling improves workflow visibility but is not itself a one-shot execution target.
issues.blocking_reason: Approval console is operator-facing control-plane work, not a narrow product/content increment.

issues.title: PRODUCT-0004 Kabukicho Survival Map MVP expansion: validate next-value POI and distribution opportunities
issues.recommended_reason: Research-to-product handoff has already been validated end-to-end.

issues.title: Issue-Centric Operation Validation
issues.recommended_reason: Operational validation is important but belongs after the product-facing one-shot workstream.
issues.blocking_reason: Validation and operator guidance are control-plane work, not one-shot-ready issue execution.

issues.title: Main Protection and Branch/PR Workflow
issues.recommended_reason: Main protection is governance work and should not flood the approval console.
issues.blocking_reason: Branch protection is a repository governance concern, not a one-shot product increment.

issues.title: Main Push Protection Activation and Verification
issues.recommended_reason: Hook activation and verification are still operator-process work rather than issue execution candidates.
issues.blocking_reason: Local hook activation is a control-plane task and not a one-shot-ready issue candidate.

issues.title: Repository Validation Path Repair
issues.recommended_reason: Validation path repair is infrastructure hygiene, useful but not a current one-shot execution target.
issues.blocking_reason: This is infrastructure maintenance, not a narrow product/content increment.

issues.title: PRODUCT-0004 Product Launch Follow-up
issues.recommended_reason: Safe narrow product follow-up is the only current open issue that fits the one-shot baseline cleanly.
